sourcesContent:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common'; import { RouterModule } from '@angular/router'; import { AuthService } from '../../services/auth.service'; import { User } from '../../models/user.model'; @Component({ selector: 'app-pos-system', standalone: true, imports: [CommonModule, RouterModule], template: `

MallConnect

Système de caisse

Caisse Produits Historique Rapports

Point de Vente

{{ currentUser.firstName }} {{ currentUser.lastName }}

Produit exemple

25,000 Ar

Stock: 10

Panier

Panier vide

Sous-total 0 Ar
Total 0 Ar
`, styles: [``] }) export class PosSystemComponent { currentUser: any; constructor(private authService: AuthService) { this.authService.currentUser$.subscribe(user => { this.currentUser = user; }); } logout(): void { this.authService.logout(); } }
